title: presentation / render-context contract
description: Homepage render context — banner, intro, seeking, the decorative place line, and the homepage nav links. Decorates the canonical JSON Resume doc (contract/jsonresume.schema.json) and never redefines its fields; build.mjs shallow-merges presentation over profile. The homepage proof line derives from the canonical projects[], not from here. Held to the same string-audit lens as the canonical copy.

banner.description: Profile banner content tokens — the strings the generated header SVG renders (banner.mjs). Colors come from brand design tokens, not here.

tagline.description: banner subtitle — one line under the name

stack.description: small-caps tech list rendered under the tagline

intro.description: hero — short first-person bio line, sits between headline and summary

place.description: decorative hero line — affiliations (e.g. 'Brooklyn · Aura · Recurse Center · Bennington'). The résumé location comes from basics.location, not here.

seeking.description: Job-search callout: what roles you're open to.

links.description: Homepage nav links (and llms.txt). The résumé contact line uses basics.profiles + the canonical email, not these.

colophon.description: "Built with" — the upstream tools that produce and validate this site (design system, gates, authoring vault, dev container), surfaced as a homepage colophon and linked to their repos. Each must be a real build input or gate; private repos are omitted (no dead links).

role.description: one line — what it does in the build
